name: Local Fairway
address: 139 N Main St Suite #1C, Simpsonville, SC 29681
about: Local Fairway is a golf simulator venue located in Simpsonville, SC, offering a relaxed, hometown atmosphere for year-round play. The facility features state-of-the-art TrackMan iO simulators and access to over 400 legendary global courses, providing a convenient alternative to traditional golf. Flexible booking options include month-to-month memberships and non-member hourly bay rentals, with sessions reserved in advance online. The venue is designed for community, family life, and accessible golf without weather concerns or long-term commitments.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan iO simulators with precise shot data
24/7 availability for flexible play anytime, rain or shine
Hometown pricing with no long-term commitments required

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art dual radar technology for precise shot tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are allowed to bring your own food and drinks (BYOB) to enjoy during your session.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for an 18-hole round, but sessions can be booked in 2-hour or 3-hour blocks depending on the membership type.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Local Fairway welcomes families and offers a relaxed atmosphere suitable for all ages, with options to bring guests.
